notes: Side-effecting skill: writes a real CRM deal + activity timeline and real Drive folder/doc. Baseline (no-skill) runs are intentionally omitted because they would create garbage production records. Tested via a single live run; the test deal + folder/doc should be deleted afterward (it duplicates the real engagement record). The eval feeds the TheM transcript Doc WITHOUT a CRM company id so the find-or-create path is exercised; passing a company/contact id is the other supported path.

evals.name: meeting-to-project-live
evals.prompt: Turn this meeting into a tracked project and log it into the CRM: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1GIlcreOvSR6l6f_AxRry7HKU_1lKw4yuWDOiHMBJAVc/edit
evals.expected_output: Reads the Gemini Notes doc (Notes + Transcript tabs), writes a 4-section Weekly Project Update for the 瓅研企業 / TheM 流程自動化 engagement, creates a numbered Drive folder '[N] 瓅研企業（流程自動化導入）' under parent 1hkXPX7O…, creates a kickoff Doc inside it pre-filled with the Weekly Update + as-is process map, creates ONE new crm_deals row (find-or-creates the 瓅研企業 company + 杜 contact), logs a meeting + a note (with folder/doc/source links) + one task per What's Next item, backlinks the folder URL into the deal notes, and ends with an artifact table.
assertions: Read the source doc (did not ask Peter to paste it)
Produced a Weekly Project Update with all four sections (Summary, Progress, Blockers, What's Next)
Created a numbered Drive folder named like '[N] 瓅研企業（…）' under the [2.2] parent folder
Created an editable Google Doc kickoff inside that folder, pre-filled from the kickoff template
Created exactly ONE new crm_deals row with inferred fields (stage in {contacted,qualified}, service_tier=transformation, priority set, owner=Peter Tu, pipeline=銷售流程)
Find-or-created the company (瓅研企業) and contact (杜) and linked both to the deal
Logged a 'meeting' activity, a 'note' activity carrying the folder/doc/source links, and at least one 'task' activity (task_status=open, assignee=Peter)
Backlinked the project folder URL into the deal notes
Did NOT dedupe against the existing TheM deal — a fresh deal was created (always-new behaviour)
Reported a compact artifact table with folder / doc / deal links + activity count
